company-core.guidance: Define the global company vision that all approved agents must align with.
Capture operating context (stage, constraints, risk envelope, market pressure).
List decision-driving core values that govern human and agent behavior.
Specify global non-negotiable requirements all workflows and channels must obey.

product-context.guidance: Describe the product value proposition and customer impact in concrete terms.
List approved core features that agents may optimize or communicate.
Define technical boundaries (latency, privacy, deployment constraints, integration boundaries).

global-assets.guidance: Provide comma-separated approved global skills for onboarding use.
Provide comma-separated approved KPIs for agent mapping.

global-guardrails.guidance: Provide comma-separated approved protocols for governance and safety boundaries.
Provide comma-separated approved data inputs shared across agents.

agent-workflows.guidance: Provide comma-separated workflow IDs approved for execution by the selected virtual employees.
Define dependency chain and escalation rules for workflow execution sequencing.

infrastructure-finalization.guidance: Map approved agents to approved channels (e.g. mira>telegram:ops-room;eva>chat:director).
Define channel security and approval gates for outbound communication.
